titleStmt.title: SII 9.460: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 460. (A.R. No. 376 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD NEAR THE AMMUNAJEGUTTA IN POLALI AMMUNAJE, MANGALORE TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1387, Pārthiva, Siṁha-māsa, 15, Budhavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1465 August 13, Tuesday (not Wednesday). It refers itself to the reign of Prauḍha-Mallikārjunadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that when Rāmachandra-Daṇāyka was administering the kingdom under the royal seal and Viṭṭharasa was governing the Maṇgalūru-rajya, Āllappa-Śēkhara Chauṭa and his three brothers gave a land to Mañjaṇaśēkhara and his sisters, for offerings to the goddess Poḷaladēvī.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1387 neya vartamāna pārthivasaṁ
vatsarada siṁhamāsa 15 neya budhavāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa prauḍhamallikārjunadēvarāya ma
hārāyaru vijayanagariyalu stirasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi catrusamu
dramadhyarājyava pratipālisuvalli Āvara mudreUṁgurava dharisi śrīmanmahāpradhāna rā
macaṁdradaṇāyakkaru samastarāṇuve pārupathyavanu citteyisi yalli Āvara nirūpa
diṁda viṭharasaru maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu śrīmatu puttigeya jana
nadalu bāḷuva Āllappasēkharāda cauṭaru Āvara taṁma dēvaruśēkharu bīmaṁ
ṇaśēkharu bhoṁmaṇasēkharu sahavāgi Āṁmuḷiṁjadalu kar(ṁ)mmaraṁbaḷiya
baṁgamaṁjuva Āḷiya maṁjaṇaśēkhara Ātana Oḍahuṭṭida dēvakkasaḷaṁtiti bi
rmakkanāyattiyavarige barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare khāṁḍenāḍa baṁgamaṁ
juva modalāda hiriyaru lōkabeṭṭeṁba bāḷikeyanu bāḷi baṁdalli Ālliya teru si
ddāya baḍḍi vāsi hoṁnu bhattavanu kālakālake naḍasatīrade yiralāgi Āruvārava biṭṭu mu
ṁde naḍasuvaṁtāgi kaṭikoṁḍa siddhāya gadyāṇa 17 bhata sīme sahaba 30lka mu 236 ba 6
nu varuṣaṁprati naḍasōdake haruvilada nimitta nivage nāvelaru Oppi yēḷu hoṁnanū bha
ttadiṁda nūrayeppatāru baḷe Āranu guṇavamāḍidevu muṁdakke niṁma bāḷikeyalu paṭṭi
labida kāru bitu baḷḷa 30 Adalu mu 61 makki kallimaru mu 6 beṭṭu mu 53
A(ṁ)ntu muḍi tāde mu 120 Ākṣāradalu mūḍe nūrayippatanu nīu bāḷi Ā bāḷi
keyiṁda poḷaladēviya śrīgaṁdha naṁdādīptige varuṣaṁprati naḍava sīme saṁṇa pratāpa
gadyāṇa 10 Ā hattuhonnu dēvara vruṣāpūjeya Āmṛtapaḍiya bagege sīme bhattaba
ḷa 30 ladalu mu 60 yī hoṁnu bhattavanu kālakālakke tappade naḍasi baruhaneṁ
du kaṭṭikoṭṭevu yī hoṁnu bhattavalade mattāvasīme siddhāyada hoṁnu bhattadalagga vi
lla �yo tāvige Oḷage baṁdu horaganyaru tāgutaḍava māḍidare nāvu pariharisi bāḷisi koḍuvevu
yiṁteppudakke sākṣi kūvelaṁ baḷiya narasiṁgārika keyyaraṁ baḷiya dāṁbaheggaḍeyaru
māyalaheggaḍe baḷiya birumaṇa koṭāri kōvāri baḷiya pārakāntu yiṁtivarellaroppi ba
rasi koṭa śilāśāsana yī śāsanada Āḍakakke tappidavaruḷḷare poḷaladēviya pratimeyyanu bhi(ṁ)nnava māḍida
dōṣa kavileyanu kayyāre vadhisida dōṣekke hōharu Ādu nimitta Ā bāḷikeya sīmeyanunaḍa
si sukhadalu bāḷūvudu . śrī . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāt śrīyōrupālanaṁ . dānāt svargga
mavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . śubhamastu . maṁgaḷaṁ mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī
śrī śilāśāsanakke sākki Aṁmuḷijada hegaḍe mallu dēvaru dāṁbahegaḍeyarū
māyilāgada bhaḷibuhegaḍe baḷi kelōjabaḷiṁ sāllike kuvelu baḷiyāva
nū yavara Ubhayanadiṁ baredava śaṁtarasēnabōvanū .
Digital edition of SII 9.460 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
